title: metaporana parvifolia var. obovata
intro: Metaporana parvifolia var. obovata, also known as a variety of the Metaporana parvifolia plant, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Metaporana parvifolia var. obovata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Metaporana parvifolia var. obovata include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
